name: Kiss of Death
description: A Maliwan transfusion grenade that homes in on a single enemy, latches on, and deals steady elemental damage until the fuse ends in an explosion. It is built for deleting one target rather than clearing a crowd, and the attached drain gives it a strong support angle during tougher fights.
notes:
Hyperius the Invincible can drop it. Its name alludes to the "kiss of death," a fatal or betraying kiss that marks someone for execution.

A pre-1.07 bug in The Pre-Sequel let Moxxi's Toy Box be reopened after it vanished by entering Concordia from Triton Flats, which made repeated farming of Kiss of Death and other items possible there.

special.description: Always homes in with a fixed 3-second fuse and boosted damage. It sticks to an enemy, deals damage over time until detonation or death, and then releases up to six life orbs that can heal allies.
special.title: It takes two to get one in trouble.
